summary: Verified fix for KOSTIN Variants Manager displaying auto-grouped variants. Backend endpoint GET /api/products/variants/all-groups returns 200 with manual_groups (0) and auto_groups (910). Frontend VariantsManager renders two tabs: 'Manual Groups (0)' and 'Auto-linked (910)'. Auto tab shows group cards with base name (e.g. 'Bvlgari Omnia Crystalline EDT'), brand tag (Bvlgari), 9 variant products with numbered order, thumbnail images, and prices. 'Convert to manual group' button is present on each auto-group card. Manual tab shows 'No groups created' correctly. Bug fix works end-to-end.

issues: Tabs and Convert button render in English ('Manual Groups', 'Auto-linked', 'Convert to manual group') even though header language selector shows BG. Bulgarian translations exist in code (lines 41-48 of VariantsManager.jsx: 'Ръчно свързани', 'Автоматично свързани', 'Преобразувай в ръчна група') but are not activated. Likely admin panel language context defaults to EN. Minor i18n issue, not a functional blocker.

action_items: Optional: ensure VariantsManager honors the BG language selector so Bulgarian labels appear (currently defaults to EN txt object).
critical_code_review_comments: convertToManualGroup uses baseName.substring(0,20) which can produce weird group_name mid-word truncation - consider full base_name or word-boundary truncation.
unlinkAllInGroup issues N sequential POST requests in a for-loop (line 224) - could be a bulk endpoint for large groups.
loadExistingGroups fetches all 910 auto-groups at once with nested products - consider pagination for performance on this admin screen.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant Manager auto-group feature is fully working. Login flow: /auth -> submit -> /. Admin panel at /admin has a tab labeled 'variantsTab' (not translated). Cookie banner appears; click 'Essential Only' to dismiss before navigating. Backend endpoint /api/products/variants/all-groups requires admin cookie session.
